Tiffiny Walls-Fox, Esq. (213-412-2661; twallsfox@eghblaw.com) of Edlin, Gallagher, Huie & Blum LLP for Defendant, Dakota Ortega.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DAKOTA ORTEGA'S Motion To Contest Good Faith Settlement Determination:

Defendant and cross-complainant Dakota Ortega's motion to contest good faith settlement determination is granted. This ruling is without prejudice to the settlors seeking a good faith determination of the proffered settlement based upon a more fully developed evidentiary record.

[see word minutes for details.]

Order is signed.
